issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect for this effect. The card text says 'add 1 card from your Life area to your hand', which is DrawCard (or TakeLifeToHand in legacy). FlipLife is a damage mechanic. Should be DrawCard with source 'Life'.
Missing 'optional' flag. Text says 'You may add', indicating this is optional, not mandatory.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text explicitly states '[Rush] during this turn', which requires DuringYourTurn duration per specification rules.
